# Genesis Conductor — Full Documentation Bundle

Generated: 2025-04-10T14:32:45Z

## README

# Ambient Access Layer

Persistent, specialized, asynchronous AI agents accessible from the tools developers already use.

### Features
- **Task Routing**: Intelligent routing to specialist agents (Kiro, Codex, Claude, Gemini)
- **Soul Capsule**: Persistent event log across sessions
- **Approval Gates**: Configurable policies for production changes
- **MCP Integration**: 11 tools via JSON-RPC 2.0

### Endpoints
- POST /v1/tasks - Submit a new task
- GET /v1/tasks/:id - Get task status
- POST /v1/tasks/:id/approve - Approve a pending task
- GET /v1/capsule/:user_id - Get user's Soul Capsule

### Authentication
Bearer token required for all /v1/* endpoints.

## Architecture

The Ambient Access Layer runs on Cloudflare Workers with:
- D1 for task persistence
- KV for API keys and routing
- Queues for async processing
- R2 for artifact storage

## OpenAPI Specification

```yaml
openapi: 3.1.0
info:
  title: Ambient Access Layer
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Task routing and approval API for ambient AI agents
servers:
  - url: https://optimization-inversion.genesisconductor.io
paths:
  /v1/tasks:
    post:
      summary: Submit a new task
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/TaskEnvelope'
      responses:
        '202':
          description: Task accepted
  /v1/tasks/{id}:
    get:
      summary: Get task status
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
components:
  schemas:
    TaskEnvelope:
      type: object
      required: [type, payload]
      properties:
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [code_review, deployment, data_analysis, research]
        payload:
          type: object
        priority:
          type: string
          enum: [low, medium, high, critical]
```
